_README: Curated ADJACENT-skill relations (taxonomy overlay; survives skills.json regeneration). A candidate who demonstrably has one side of a relation earns PARTIAL (half) credit for the other when a job asks for it — recruiters credit close transfer (PostgreSQL person can do MySQL); keyword matching scores it zero. Loaded by matching/taxonomy.py: 'clusters' relate every pair inside the list; 'pairs' relate exactly the two ids. Ids must exist in skills.json to take effect (unknown ids are inert). Keep this HIGH-PRECISION: only add relations where an entry-level hiring manager would genuinely accept the adjacent skill; the deterministic ranker refuses any adjacency claim not in this file.
